name: External Remote Service Access
description: Detects successful authentications to externally-facing remote services from unusual locations
query:
// External Remote Service Access
// Successful login from external IP to VPN/remote access
events from authentication
where event_type = "authentication_success"
  and (service = "vpn" or service = "citrix" or service = "rdp")
  and not source_ip starts_with "10."
  and not source_ip starts_with "192.168."
  and not source_ip starts_with "172."
group by username, source_ip
having count(*) >= 1
within 300 seconds
